title: Verbal Periphrases (Perífrasis Verbales)
summary: The structural pattern class behind ir a + infinitivo, acabar de + infinitivo, volver a + infinitivo, llevar + gerundio, the tener que/haber que/deber three-way obligation contrast, and seguir/continuar + gerundio — one grammatical shape (conjugated verb + link + non-finite form) underneath six everyday constructions.
